overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting exploration of a dimly lit, cluttered office interior followed by exit to a bright desert settlement with cyberpunk architecture. The player approaches a locked door before turning back and exiting to an outdoor environment featuring neon-lit buildings, trailers, and red rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered office corridor with computer workstations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit office toward a door with red overhead lighting, passing desks and scattered papers

entered.detail: grey metal desk with computer equipment and papers
dark door with glowing red light strip above the frame
door with small window and green overhead lighting
loose papers and debris on the carpeted floor
tall metal shelving with boxes and equipment

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow, dimly lit office corridor with artificial lighting. Metal desks with computer monitors line the left side while a door with red overhead lighting draws attention ahead. Papers are scattered across the carpeted floor, and the space feels abandoned and cluttered.

scene_state.functional_zone: office interior turning back toward exit

events.description: approaching the red-lit door reveals it is locked and unpowered, requiring a key
player turns around 180 degrees and begins walking back toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: turning away from the locked door and walking back through the office toward the exit

entered.detail: fluorescent light panels on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: After discovering the red-lit door is locked, the player turns around and heads back through the office. The exit door with green lighting becomes the new focal point as the camera pivots and moves toward it, passing the same desks now from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert settlement with cyberpunk architecture and abandoned trailers

events.description: player opens the exit door and steps from dark interior into bright desert sunlight
holographic wireframe projection appears near the building, suggesting a glitch or scan effect

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and exploring the desert exterior, walking around the structure to inspect the surroundings

entered.detail: rounded building with pink neon trim and large digital billboard displaying 'S.P.C.'
grey mobile home with tires stacked alongside and satellite equipment on roof
large red rock formations and arid hills in the distance
scattered desert shrubs and small green trees
glowing blue and green wireframe cube projection hovering near the building
large satellite communication dish on a stand

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the office into a bright, sunlit desert environment. A cyberpunk-style building with pink neon accents stands prominently while a trailer home sits nearby surrounded by scattered tires and satellite equipment. A holographic wireframe projection flickers into existence near the building as the player explores the arid landscape with red rock formations in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit office interior into a sprawling, sun-drenched cyberpunk desert settlement. It begins by navigating a narrow, cluttered corridor lined with metal desks and scattered papers, moving toward a door marked by ominous red overhead lighting. Upon finding the door locked, the camera pivots and retreats through the same abandoned office, shifting its focus toward a green-lit exit. As the player passes through this doorway, the dim artificial light abruptly gives way to a bright, arid landscape featuring red rock formations and a pink neon-accented building. The scene finally expands to reveal a trailer home surrounded by satellite equipment and tires, while a holographic wireframe projection flickers into existence in the open air.
